PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING='utf-8'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $sess = New-Object Microsoft.PowerShell.Commands.WebRequestSession; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/watchlist/add" -Method POST -Body @{ticker='MSFT'} -WebSession $sess -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30 | Out-Null } catch { Write-Output "add err: $_" }; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/watchlist" -WebSession $sess -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $html=$r.Content; foreach \($kw in @\('MSFT','العائد منذ الإضافة','سعر الإضافة'\)\) { if \($html -match $kw\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $kw" } else { Write-Output "MISSING: $kw" } })

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING='utf-8'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/compare?tickers=AAPL,MSFT,NVDA" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $html=$r.Content; foreach \($kw in @\('AAPL','MSFT','NVDA','Piotroski','Catalyst','ROE'\)\) { if \($html -match $kw\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $kw" } else { Write-Output "MISSING: $kw" } })

PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING='utf-8'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Output "...جاري تحديث الكاش \(قد يأخذ دقيقة\)"; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/screener/refresh" -Method POST -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 180 | Out-Null } catch { Write-Output "refresh err: $_" }; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:5000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 30; Write-Output "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $html=$r.Content; foreach \($kw in @\('NVDA','Piotroski','القيمة السوقية','آخر تحديث','تحديث البيانات'\)\) { if \($html -match $kw\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $kw" } else { Write-Output "MISSING: $kw" } })
